title: Advancement Criterion
description: Mod for Minecraft 1.12.2 that adds an advancement criterion for objectives using the scoreboard system. Can be used to track who on the server collects the most advancements.
body:
Mod for Minecraft which adds an advancement criterion for objectives using the scoreboard system. Can be used to track who on the server collects the most advancements.

Source code is open to the public at: [https://github.com/InsomniaWins/advancement-criterion](https://github.com/InsomniaWins/advancement-criterion)
